name: pact-renew
_note: insurance.pact-renew extends an inheritance pact's expiry and flips it back to active (renewCount++). Fail-CLOSED: poisoned numeric durationDays (NaN/Infinity/1e308/negative) returns ok:false invalid_durationDays BEFORE the write. Revoked/fired pacts reject. An expired pact re-bases off now; an active pact extends from its current expiry. STATE-backed per-user via the internal owner actor — an unknown/empty pactId returns 'pact not found', NEVER no_db. No CC is touched (sparks-only lens).
